design_summary: agents/eval/pipeline.py is a new leaf module (docs/LLD/eval.md and docs/LLD/llm-provider.md already documented the intended design; this subtask makes it real). Exactly one function, generate_final_answer(), performs final-answer generation for all three arms by reusing query.synthesizer.synthesize_answer verbatim (the real, already-implemented production call path) rather than a parallel implementation. Three thin wrappers (run_hivemind_arm, run_vector_rag_arm, run_graphrag_lite_arm) each do only that arm's own retrieval then call the one shared function -- the enforcement mechanism is structural (single code path), not just an assertion, and the test file additionally spies on both generate_final_answer and the underlying LLMClient.complete() to prove identical call signature/model config across arms.
test_results: 5/5 new tests pass. Full agents/eval/ suite: 88/88 (83 pre-existing + 5 new), no regressions. agents/query + agents/llm suites: 169 passed, 2 deselected (query/test_server.py, query/test_wiring.py -- pre-existing protobuf/grpc gencode-version-mismatch environment issue, same class already disclosed in 5.1.3's/5.2.1's own verification notes, unrelated to this diff). ruff check clean on both new files.

constraints_confirmed.existing_source_files_unmodified: synthesizer.py, agents/llm/*, all three baseline modules (vector_rag.py, vector_rag_rerank.py, graphrag_lite.py) are read-only dependencies -- confirmed via git diff --stat showing 0 changes to any of them

not_verified_by_self: Per invariant I4, this implementer did not verify its own work. Handoff is for /cdr:verify to independently re-run agents/eval/test_shared_final_llm.py and confirm the disclosed reasoning.
open_items_for_verifier: Confirm generate_final_answer is genuinely the ONLY final-answer call path for all three arms (no other code path in agents/eval/ or agents/query/ constructs a competing synthesis call for benchmark purposes).

Confirm run_hivemind_arm's documented scope boundary (accepts an already-retrieved retrieved_doc_ids list rather than re-invoking agents/query/pipeline.py's gRPC-backed run_query_pipeline) is an acceptable interpretation of 'HiveMind ... produce its final answer via the exact same call path' for this subtask's stated impacted-module scope (agents/eval/pipeline.py + its test only).
This is the FINAL subtask of issue #27 (milestone #7, Phase 5) -- once verified, issue #27 should be closed, mirroring how 5.1.3's cdr-commit agent closed issue #26 after its last subtask.

docs/LLD/eval.md was updated (one paragraph, non-canonical-rewrite) to point at the new enforcement mechanism; docs/LLD/eval.md's top-level 'Status: scaffold only' line was deliberately left unchanged, matching 5.2.1/5.2.2/5.2.3's own precedent of not rewriting that header (none of those three prior subtasks touched docs/LLD/eval.md at all, per git log).
